title: Etsan's Better Hotbar 26.2
description:
This pack only changes the hotbar and nothing else, this is merely an addon pack to the base game. This is 100% complete unless I feel that there needs to be a change or an addition to better improve the hotbar and I am open to suggestions :) 
26.1 ready!
body:
![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/337d2b006f321fe586749eedd1262f26e226aa09_0.webp)This pack only changes the hotbar and nothing else, this is merely an addon pack to the base game. This hotbar aims to be have very little intrusion on the screen and increase visibility. This is 100% complete unless I feel that there needs to be a change or an addition to better improve the hotbar and I am open to suggestions :) 

The pack is 26.1 ready!
Now with appleskin support!

This resource pack is not to be redistributed, reuploaded or ported by another party.

If you are looking for the tool textures you can find them by visiting my other resourcepack: [Etsan's Better Tools](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/etsans-better-tools/versions)
